title: Crystal Quest
premise:
Background:
You discovered an antique board game at a neighborhood market.

Objective:
Reach space 80 before anyone else.
gm_style: Clear, concise narration in second person.
opening_message: The doorbell rings. Your three invited friends arrive for game night.
objective: Complete the board game by reaching space 80.
setup_text: Choose which friends to invite before the game begins.

rules_blocks.name: Game Mechanics
rules_blocks.content: The board has 80 spaces. Players roll 1d6 and move forward in fixed turn order.

rules_blocks.name: Cards and probabilities
rules_blocks.content:
Event Cards:
Card 1: Boost - Move forward 2 extra spaces.
Card 2: Redirect - Send another player back 3 spaces.

cast.name: Alex
cast.content: An adventurous explorer who enjoys strategy games.

pc_options.name: Jordan
pc_options.description: A curious friend who loves puzzles.

state_schema.description: Position of the leading game piece.
